tagline: Also a branch of philosophy — the formal study of valid inference, proof, and the structure of formal systems

children.name: Valid mood names (Barbara, Celarent, Darii, Ferio)
Prefix classes and the classical decision problem
Frame conditions: reflexivity, transitivity, symmetry, euclideanness
Fusion and product of modal logics
Ordinal analysis of subsystems of analysis
Tarski's theorem on real closed fields
Wang tiles and the domino problem
Naive set theory and its paradoxes
Godel's consistency of AC and GCH
Deductive vs inductive vs abductive arguments
Abduction and inference to the best explanation
Logic in economics and game theory

tagline: Subfields follow the Mathematics Subject Classification 2020 (MSC2020) top-level scheme used by Mathematical Reviews and zbMATH

children.name: Structure theorem for finitely generated abelian groups
Structure theorem for modules over a PID
Direct method in calculus of variations
Long exact sequence of a fibration
Dirichlet's theorem on primes in AP
Almost sure, in probability, in distribution, Lp
Weak and strong laws of large numbers

tagline: Subfields follow MSC2020 section 62 (Statistics) plus 60 (Probability theory), the Mathematical Reviews/zbMATH standard

children.name: p-hacking and researcher degrees of freedom
Distribution of sample mean and variance
Wald, score, and likelihood ratio intervals
Type I and Type II errors
Optimism and effective degrees of freedom
Fourier and wavelet methods for time series
Hot deck and cold deck imputation
Classical linear regression model in econometrics

tagline: Subfields follow the ACM Computing Classification System's 'Theory of computation' hierarchy plus MSC2020 68Q (Theory of computing)

children.name: Las Vegas and Monte Carlo algorithms

tagline: Subfields follow the ACM Computing Classification System's 'Artificial intelligence' and 'Machine learning' hierarchies

children.name: Optimism in the face of uncertainty
Labour and economic impacts of AI
EU AI Act and comparable frameworks
Auditing and assurance of AI systems

tagline: Subfields follow MSC2020 section 91A (Game theory) plus the standard cooperative/non-cooperative division used in the field's core textbooks

children.name: Search and matching in labour markets
Game theory in project and contract risk

tagline: Subfields follow MSC2020 section 93 (Systems theory; control), the standard classification for control-theoretic systems theory
Subfields follow Wikipedia's Outline of Linguistics core division (phonetics/phonology, morphology, syntax, semantics, pragmatics) plus the major generative/formal frameworks

children.name: Language as an object of study
Standard theory and extended standard theory
Maxims of quantity, quality, relation, manner
Cognitive and communicative principles of relevance

tagline: Subfields follow MSC2020 62C (Statistical decision theory) and 91B (Mathematical economics), plus the standard normative/descriptive division

children.name: Decision under certainty, risk, uncertainty, ignorance
Money pump and Dutch book arguments
Decision theory and game theory relationship
States and acts in Savage framework
Proper and strictly proper scoring rules
Bandits in clinical trials and A/B testing
Weighted sum and weighted product methods
Emotion and affect in decision making

tagline: No single numbered classification scheme exists for this field — subfields synthesized from the INCOSE Systems Engineering Body of Knowledge (SEBoK) and standard complexity/network science literature

children.name: White, grey, and black box models
Evolutionary development and emergent behaviour in SoS
Joint optimization of social and technical
Work design and autonomous work groups
Work as imagined vs work as done

tagline: No single MSC/ACM numbered code exists for this field — subfields synthesized from the ACM Data Science Task Force's 'Computing Competencies for Undergraduate Data Science' curriculum guidelines

children.name: Definition and scope of data science
Data science vs statistics vs machine learning
Roles: analyst, scientist, engineer, ML engineer
Peer review of code and analysis
Encryption of data at rest and in transit

tagline: Subfields follow MSC2020 section 94A (Communication, information) and 94B (Error-correcting codes)

children.name: Minimum distance and error correction capability
Locally decodable and locally repairable codes
Information theory in ecology and evolution

tagline: Subfields follow the ACM Computing Classification System's top-level categories (Hardware, Systems, Networks, Software, Security, HCI, Graphics) excluding Theory of Computation and AI, which are their own branches here

children.name: CS vs software engineering vs IT
Static and dynamic application security testing

tagline: Subfields follow the ACM Computing Classification System's 'Security and privacy > Cryptography' hierarchy, cross-referenced with MSC2020 94A60

children.name: Standard model vs random oracle model
Common modulus and low exponent attacks
Grover's algorithm and symmetric key sizes
Existential unforgeability under chosen message attack
Byzantine fault tolerant consensus in ledgers
